title: ZXPong Guide
description: Complete ZXPong guide covering the release-facing match loop, controls, Solo play, World PVP, coins, achievements, and leaderboards.
summary: A compact ZXPong guide for players while the app is Awaiting App Store approval.
sourceNotes: Compiled from the ZXPong v1.1 documentation pages in this rollout.
Public status is Awaiting App Store approval. Final App Store metadata remains To Verify after Apple approval.

sections.heading: Start here
paragraphs: ZXPong is a short-session arcade paddle game: defend your side, return the ball, and build longer rallies.
For the current release-facing build, focus on Solo play and World PVP. Local PVP is not advertised here because it is hidden by the current release flag.

sections.heading: Core guide path
paragraphs: Read How to Play for the match loop, Controls for paddle discipline, and Game Modes for release-facing mode status.
After that, use Coins, Achievements, Leaderboards, and Tips & Strategy to plan repeat sessions.
bullets: How to Play: goal, session flow, scoring, and rallies
Controls: paddle movement, positioning, and timing
Game Modes: Solo play, World PVP, and Local PVP status
Progression: BarkinMad Coins, achievements, leaderboards, and skins

sections.heading: Release check
paragraphs: This documentation is ready for release while ZXPong is Awaiting App Store approval, with only final approval-dependent metadata or artwork updates expected.
Pages that lack final artwork use the shared placeholder until replacement ZXPong-specific images are available.

images.alt: Placeholder artwork for pending ZXPong documentation images
images.caption: Shared placeholder used for pending page artwork
